title: miconia calophylla
intro: Miconia calophylla, also known as the 'false jasmine', is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Miconia calophylla include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Miconia calophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
